meaning: 1. to lobby; 2. to campaign; 3. to promote (an idea, a product); 4. (o
sentence: 这家公司花了大量资金游说议员。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī huā le dàliàng zījīn yóushuì yìyuán.
english: This company spent a lot of money lobbying lawmakers.

sentence: 她在大学主修计算机科学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū jìsuànjī kēxué.
english: She majored in computer science at university.

sentence: 她从小就梦想进入演艺圈。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng jìnrù yǎnyì quān.
english: She dreamed of entering the performing arts world since childhood.

meaning: 1. to leave sth unused; 2. to lie idle
sentence: 这台机器已经闲置很久了，没人用。
pinyin: Zhè tái jīqì yǐjīng xiánzhì hěn jiǔ le, méi rén yòng.
english: This machine has been sitting idle for a long time with no one using it.

sentence: 这里的信仰者每周日都会来做礼拜。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de xìnyǎngzhě měi zhōurì dōu huì lái zuò lǐbài.
english: The believers here come to worship every Sunday.
